betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The call has been answered!
A new awareness has been gained!
The call to the Universe's Mission fills my mind.
From here, as the newly Risen Undead Lord of Gluttony, there are three tasks that I must complete.
The plea of the Testificates. They have suffered incredible hardship by the hand of the Meatball Man, but now that I hold this power, I can undo the deeds of my predessor. Alchemy, that was the key all along. A power given, as a gift, and never earned. The magic of the Realmshifters, it now calls me. The one who has bestowed this power upon me, they now lead me to the place where I shall restore Balance.
The summons of the other Undead Lords. My new companions await me, asking me to prove myself as better than my predecessor. The power I now hold, it is part of something larger, and to wield it with justice, I must merge it with my companions'.
The fallout of the war for Terra. The Crimson Cult, while not being the flashiest contenders in the contest to gain the Dimensional Shards' powers, may have been the ones to succeed if I had not intervened. And they may still succeed. Unlike the other enemies, the Crimson Emperor's ambitions included schemes that are now still underway, long after the downfall of his cult. If I do not address them, it may very well be that Terra will enter another war.
And to answer all of these calls, I need a new form of power, one that I will answer with technology, a new machine! I am still the same person, after all! I need to get my hands on the most fundamental form of matter, as it was when the universe was born.
